description: Phase 1.3 - Glassmorphism and Motion Design: Enhance the existing glass utility system to align with the 5-level glass hierarchy from the design bible. Add proper spring easing curves, page transition animations, scroll-triggered entrance animations, and standardize motion timing (150ms micro, 250ms standard, 350ms complex). Update existing glass classes to use the 5-level system (subtle, light, medium, heavy, ultra).
steps: In app/globals.css, refine the existing glass utilities to clearly define 5 glass levels per the design bible: .glass-subtle (blur 4px, opacity 40%), .glass-light (blur 8px, opacity 55%), .glass-medium (blur 16px, opacity 70% - current .glass), .glass-heavy (blur 24px, opacity 80% - current .glass-elevated), .glass-ultra (blur 32px, opacity 90%). Keep existing class names as aliases/maps to the new levels so nothing breaks.

Add CSS custom properties for motion timing: --duration-micro (150ms), --duration-standard (250ms), --duration-complex (350ms), --duration-page (500ms). Add spring easing: --ease-spring (cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)), --ease-smooth (cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)), --ease-bounce (cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55))
Add a .glass-lighting utility that adds a subtle top highlight gradient (simulating overhead lighting per the design bible lighting system)

Add scroll-triggered entrance animation utility classes: .animate-on-scroll-fade, .animate-on-scroll-slide-up, .animate-on-scroll-scale using CSS @keyframes with animation-timeline: view() for browsers that support it, with a graceful fallback
Add @keyframes for page transitions: pageEnter (fade + slide up 20px), pageExit (fade out + slide down 10px). Add .animate-page-enter class.
Update app/loading.tsx skeleton to use proper shimmer with the design bible's skeleton loading pattern (wave effect rather than just background animation)
Run 'bun run build' to confirm no regressions
acceptance_criteria: 5 glass levels are defined in globals.css with proper blur/opacity/border values
Existing glass class names still work (backward compatible)
Motion timing tokens are defined as CSS custom properties
Spring easing curves are available as CSS custom properties
bun run lint passes with 0 errors
findings: All 5 glass levels added alongside existing glass classes (no breaking changes). Motion timing tokens and spring easing curves added to :root. The glass-lighting utility uses ::before pseudo-element with border-radius: inherit so it adapts to any container shape. Scroll-triggered animations use animation-timeline: view() with @supports fallback for browsers without support - fallback shows elements immediately without animation. Enhanced shimmer uses a multi-stop gradient with opacity pulse (shimmerWave keyframe) for a more premium wave effect. Pre-existing lint warnings (2) in SearchFilters.tsx remain unchanged. Build compiles successfully with all 14 pages generated.
